title: Azure RPG Items
description: Adds new Mine and Slash weapons and Curios items.
body:
<center>

This mod adds new Axes, Swords, Bows, Rings and Necklaces to [Mine and Slash](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mine-and-slash-reloaded). 

</center>

<center>

## Items

![](https://i.imgur.com/EcwaPnn.png)

</center>

<center>

## Where to Find Them?:

The items are automatically added to Mine and Slash drops. I have set a config setting though so you can turn off my auto compatibility to configure them yourselves.
</center>

<center>

## Texture Credits: 

https://stealthix.itch.io/pixel-bow-pack

https://alexs-assets.itch.io/16x16-rpg-item-pack 
</center>
